message:
🌱 Refactor Clusters.tsx with extracted components

- Replace inline Stats Overview with StatsOverview component
- Replace inline Filter Tabs with FilterTabs component
- Replace inline Cluster Grid with ClusterGrid component
- Update ClusterGrid to use compact icon badges (Star, WifiOff, ShieldAlert icons only)
- Add collapsible sections for Stats Overview and Cluster Cards
- Remove unused imports after component extraction
- Reduce Clusters.tsx from ~2500 to ~2038 lines (~462 line reduction)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
